crisscross.def: 縱橫交錯的、矛盾的人的人人物 (單數) (交)
crisscross.ex: The field had a crisscross pattern.

criterion.def: 標準、準則、判斷基準人物 (單數) (標)
criterion.ex: Success is the main criterion for us.

criteria.def: 標準、準則人物 (複數使用) (標)
criteria.ex: You must meet all the local criteria.

critic.def: 批評家、評論家、吹毛求疵者人物 (單數) (評)
critic.col: art critic, food critic, sharp critic
critic.ex: The art critic loved the new painting.

critical.def: 關鍵的、批評的、危急的、批判性地的人的人物 (單數) (關)
critical.col: critical thinking, critical condition, critical mass
critical.ex: The patient is in a critical condition.

critically.ex: Her father is currently critically ill.

criticize/criticise.def: 批評、評論、吹毛求疵的人的人
criticize/criticise.ex: Don't criticize him for his mistakes.

criticism.def: 批評、評論、吹毛求疵的人物 (單數) (評)
criticism.ex: He can't take any local criticism at all.

critique.def: 評論、批評的人物、發表評論的人的人人物 (單數) (評)
critique.ex: She wrote a detailed critique of book.

critter.def: (口)小生物、小動物、傢伙人物 (單數) (物)
critter.ex: A small critter ran across the path.

croak.def: 呱呱聲、嘶啞地說、死的人的人人物 (單數) (呱)
croak.ex: The frog gave a loud deep croak.

crochet.def: 鉤針編織、鉤製的人的人人物 (單數) (鉤)
crochet.ex: She spent the day doing some crochet.

crock.def: 瓦罐、老廢物、(口)胡說八道的人物、受封的人的人人物 (單數) (罐)
crock.col: crock of gold, old crock (破車)
crock.ex: Don't drive that old crock of a car.

crockery.def: 陶器、瓦器(總稱)人物 (單數) (陶)

crocodile.def: 鱷魚、虛情假意的人物 (單數) (鱷)
crocodile.col: crocodile tears (虛假眼淚), crocodile skin
crocodile.ex: She shed crocodile tears at the news.

crocus.def: (植)藏紅花、番紅花人物 (單數) (花)
crocus.ex: The purple crocus bloomed in spring.

croft.def: 佃農的小農場、小田地人物 (單數) (農)
croft.ex: They lived in a lonely highland croft.

crofter.ex: The poor crofter worked on the hill.

cromlech.ex: They visited an ancient local cromlech.

crone.def: 醜老太婆、乾癟老婦人物 (單數) (醜)
crone.ex: The withered crone sat by the fire.

crony.def: 密友、親信、老朋友人物 (單數) (友)
crony.ex: He gave the job to a political crony.

cronyism.def: 任人唯親、裙帶關係人物 (單數) (親)
cronyism.ex: The mayor was guilty of cronyism.

crook.def: 騙子、彎曲處、牧羊杖、使彎曲的人的人人物 (單數) (騙/彎)
crook.col: crook of arm, hook and crook (千方百計)
crook.ex: He is a very dirty and greedy crook.

crooked.def: 彎曲的、不誠實的人的人 (或物) (彎/騙)
crooked.ex: He has a very crooked and evil smile.

crookedly.ex: The picture was hung crookedly now.

croon.def: 柔聲低唱、低聲吟的人的人人物 (單數) (吟)
croon.ex: She began to croon a sweet lullaby.

crooner.def: 柔聲歌手、低吟歌手人物 (單數) (歌)
crooner.ex: Bing Crosby was a famous crooner.

crop.def: 農作物、產量、剪短、收穫的人的人人物 (單數) (作)
crop.col: crop up (突然發生), bumper crop, cash crop
crop.ex: The corn crop was very good today.

cropper.def: (口)大失敗、收割者人物 (單數) (敗)
cropper.ex: His latest project came a cropper.

cropping.def: 收割、裁剪、種植的人 (或物) (割)
cropping.ex: Use the cropping tool to fix the photo.

croquet.def: 木球戲、擊木球的人物、擊走的人的人人物 (單數) (球)
croquet.ex: They are playing croquet on the lawn.

crosier/crozier.def: 牧杖、主教杖人物 (單數) (杖)
crosier/crozier.ex: The bishop held a golden crosier.

cross.def: 相交、交叉、十字架、憤怒的的人的人人物 (單數) (交/怒)
cross.col: keep your fingers crossed, cross out, cross my heart
cross.ex: Cross out the misspelled word now.

crossbar.ex: The ball hit the crossbar and went out.

cross-beam.ex: A solid cross-beam supported the roof.

crossbones.def: 交叉置放的兩根骨形人物 (複數使用) (骨)
crossbones.ex: The pirate flag had a skull and crossbones.

crossbow.ex: He used a steel crossbow to hunt.

crosscheck.def: 覆核、查對的人物、查對的人的人人物 (單數) (核)
crosscheck.ex: Please crosscheck the data with file.

crosscurrent.def: 逆流、交叉氣流人物 (單數) (流)
crosscurrent.ex: A strong social crosscurrent was felt.

cross-examination.def: 詰問、交叉訊問人物 (單數) (訊)

cross-examine.def: 反覆訊問、詰問的人的人
cross-examine.ex: The lawyer began to cross-examine her.

cross-eyed.def: 鬥雞眼的、斜視的人的人 (或物) (眼)
cross-eyed.ex: The baby looked a bit cross-eyed today.

crossfire.def: 交火、連珠炮似的提問人物 (單數) (火)
crossfire.ex: They were caught in the political crossfire.

crossing.def: 交叉口、渡口、橫渡的人 (或物) (口)
crossing.col: level crossing, zebra crossing, border crossing
crossing.ex: Wait at the zebra crossing for cars.

cross-legged.ex: They sat cross-legged on the floor.

cross-question.ex: The police began to cross-question him.

cross-referenced.def: 交叉引用的人的人 (或物) (引)
cross-referenced.ex: The book is well cross-referenced now.

crossroad/crossroads.def: 十字路口、轉折點人物 (單數) (口)
crossroad/crossroads.ex: The country is at a major crossroads.

cross-section.def: 橫斷面、典型、代表人物 (單數) (剖)
cross-section.ex: We spoke to a cross-section of fans.

crossways/crosswise.def: 交叉地、橫向地的人的人人物 (單數) (橫)
crossways/crosswise.ex: The logs were laid crossways on truck.

crossword.ex: He loves to do the daily crossword puzzle.

crotch.def: 胯部、分叉處人物 (單數) (胯)
crotch.ex: The pants were too tight at the crotch.

crotchet.def: (樂)四分音符、怪想、小鉤的人物 (單數) (符)
crotchet.ex: The music score has a single crotchet.

crotchety.ex: The teacher is very crotchety today.

crouch.def: 蹲下、蜷縮、卑躬屈膝的人的人人物 (單數) (蹲)
crouch.ex: The cat began to crouch low in the grass.
